# 23Hours — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A specialty sports apparel brand focused on unique basketball and football jerseys. The brand revolves around the culture and passion of sports fans, offering distinctive jersey designs that stand out from standard merchandise. The vibe is energetic, athletic, and fan-driven, with a strong connection to sports culture and team spirit.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Unleash your team spirit with 23Hours&#39; bold basketball and football jerseys. Stand out with fan-driven designs that fuel your passion. Shop now and rep your squad!

### Thank You | 23Hours
https://example.com/thank-you
23Hours - Thank You | 23Hours

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://example.com
- Endpoint: https://example.com/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text)
  - `email` (email)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About 23Hours
A specialty sports apparel brand focused on unique basketball and football jerseys. The brand revolves around the culture and passion of sports fans, offering distinctive jersey designs that stand out from standard merchandise. The vibe is energetic, athletic, and fan-driven, with a strong connection to sports culture and team spirit.

## Target Audience
- אוהדי כדורסל וכדורגל
- Basketball & Football Fans
- Athletic College Students
- Urban Fitness Enthusiasts

## Industry
Sports Apparel

---

- Sitemap (XML): https://example.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://example.com/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://example.com/llms-full.txt
